injuries.comment: The Islanders said on Wednesday (Nov. 26) that Pageau is expected to be sidelined for another 2-3 weeks but should return before Christmas.
The Avalanche said that Wedgewood is OUT for Thursday's (Dec. 4) game versus the Islanders.
The Avalanche announced on Wednesday (Dec. 3) that Brindley will join the Avalanche on their upcoming four-game road trip and might play before the end of it, per Evan Rawal of the Denver Gazette.
